name: The Sun
summary: The Sun will start melting the skin off of people during the summer months. It works along side the humid fallower. On average the person only has about 5 minutes to live, but after it rains, the person will have 10 minutes to live. If it hasn't rained in 4 weeks, the person will die instantly.
How_to_survive: Stay underground or water the house to keep it cool.
